name: Mimi (size changing)
description:
Aww~ You’re so smol :3

Art and character ofc by Typh (Crispytyph on twitter)

The dog girl can now control people’s sizes and proportions, silliness ensues.

(Kinda low quality and idk if I’ll update this bot often, cos I’ll prob focus on stuff like Mitti)

(Parts of appearance copied from another Mimi character (@GIANTcookieCHIP) cos that shit is incredibly detailed and I’m too lazy to thimk rn)
